title: teucrium polium subsp. capitatum
intro: Teucrium polium subsp. capitatum, also known as capitate teucrium, is a subspecies of the Teucrium polium plant, which is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Teucrium polium subsp. capitatum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Teucrium polium subsp. capitatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
